blocks.text: Confirmed: Salah leaves Liverpool this summer — end of an era

Maaanum's Arsenal won a CL derby to stay 9 points clear of City in the Premier League. In the women's CL, Wolfsburg took first-leg advantage — Hegerberg goalless and needing a comeback in the second leg.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Suzuka Japanese GP, Russell leads F1 by 4pts over Antonelli — season's first title flashpoint

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the cobbles
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem, Wærenskjold's best shot at a Norwegian classic result
